sector_profile.company_description: Sailfish Boats manufactures high-quality, family-friendly fishing boats designed for offshore and inshore use, offering a variety of center console and dual console models.
sector_profile.sector_summary: The manufacturing sector for recreational boats focuses on designing, engineering, and producing custom and production vessels with advanced materials and technologies that meet safety, performance, and customer customization demands.
rd_focus_examples: Researching lightweight composite materials for boat hulls
Developing new engine mounting methods to improve fuel efficiency
Designing ergonomic controls and consoles to improve user experience
Using CFD simulations to enhance hull hydrodynamics
Testing molding and curing processes for composite parts
Implementing advanced manufacturing automation for consistent quality
Prototyping new models for offshore performance enhancements
Developing integrated electronics and wearable technology for boats
Improving corrosion resistance of boat components
Streamlining supply chain processes through software integration
sector_profile.rd_rationale: Given the complex engineering, custom boat design, and use of advanced materials like composites, Sailfish Boats likely engages in R&D to innovate product design, manufacturing processes, and performance improvements.

activities: Developing hull designs to improve offshore stability
Innovating rod holder and console ergonomics
Testing new composite materials for weight reduction
Enhancing quality control methods using digital tools

evidence: LLM detection reason: Sailfish Boats designs and produces boats, indicating their primary activity is manufacturing physical products, specifically fishing boats.

narrative.ga_jtc_intro: The GA JTC offers a dollar-for-dollar reduction of state income tax liability when creating new jobs in certain areas. Counties are designated Tier 1 through Tier 4, with Military Zones, Less Developed Census Tracts (LDCT), and Opportunity Zones often supporting lower thresholds and larger benefits.
narrative.ga_jtc_note: Sailfish Boats Georgia locations with corresponding tier designations and estimated credit benefits are shown below. Final thresholds may be NAICS dependent and should be validated.
narrative.retraining_intro: The GA Retraining Tax Credit can provide up to 50% of eligible retraining costs, including wages of trainees, up to $1,250 per employee per year.
narrative.retraining_context: Below are industry-specific software and equipment categories with applicable programs. If implemented and employees were retrained to use them, these categories may support GA RTC claims.
